name: Eemian
description: Interglacial Stage 5e; set as base of Late Pleistocene

name: Cromerian Complex
description: Onset of inter-glacial MIS 21, and includes MIS20 and 19.

name: Waalian
description: DOTTED --Tentatively at onset of longer interglacial dominated MIS 57-45

name: Eburonian
description: Tentatively at onset of glacial MIS 62-60.  Glacial-dominated.

name: Tiglian
description: Interglacial Stage 93.  "Tiglian is a total pain and bein revised.  It might be safer to leave the Tiglian as a single unit. � We know TC4c � best candidate is MIS68-72.  There is no stronger means of correlation. (Gibbard, email to J.Ogg, Jan'06)

name: Praetiglian
description: Base arbitrarily assigned as Glacial Stage 102

name: Reuverian
description: DOTTED -- A "base" arbitrarily dotted as Interglacial Stage 107; continues older.
